notes: All prompts authored per the jerryco-visual-prompting skill workflow (SKILL.md + all references).
Engine: Higgsfield MCP primary. Call models_explore before generating to confirm current model name, aspect_ratios, and parameters.
Upload reference images via media_upload → media_confirm; pass returned media_id — never a raw URL.
Negative prompts: embed in positive prompt for Seedream (no negative field). For Flux/Ideogram use separate negative_prompt field.
status=wall-off: real footage or real client photography — do NOT generate. Flag for real capture.
status=real-project: real client project — generate only as AI stand-in; mark placeholder in manifest until replaced with actual photography.
Congruence Checklist must pass before submitting any asset to Higgsfield.
Brand hex always in parentheses. Never name a color without its hex.

generation_workflow.step_1: Call models_explore(action:'recommend', goal:'<asset_type and aspect ratio>') to confirm the best model before each generation batch.
generation_workflow.step_2: For before/after pairs: generate BEFORE first, upload via media_upload → media_confirm, pass media_id as reference when generating AFTER to maintain room spatial consistency.
generation_workflow.step_3: For founder media (about/jeremiah-spraying): if real photos of Jeremiah Ugbine are available, upload via show_characters to create a Soul reference before generating any founder-presence assets.
generation_workflow.step_4: Check balance via balance() before submitting large batches.
generation_workflow.step_5: After generation, review with job_display(). If result does not pass the 15-point Congruence Checklist, regenerate — do not upload a failing asset to Cloudinary.
congruence_checklist: Architectural truth intact (8ft vs 9ft ceiling, room type matches persona)
Light source spec honored (single source, direction specified)
Negative space controlled (counters clear unless specified)
Photographic style locked (editorial vs documentary vs product — not mixed)
Brand color hex parenthetical present in prompt
Color reading accurate (bone ≠ yellow, champagne = warm gold-beige, matte-black ≠ charcoal)
Persona match (P1 colonial, P3 triple-decker, P4 rental — not mixed)
Awareness stage match (before = documentary defect, after = editorial aspiration)
LF drives served (fear resolved, social proof visible, comfort legible)
Before/after spatial anchor identical when pair
Defect formula in before: [what]+[where]+[how much]+[plausible cause] — never mold/sewage/structural
No staged items on counters unless specified
No brand logos, no people's faces in sharp focus (hands OK for craft shots)
No stock-photo feel, no HDR, no vignette (unless specified)
